name: com.lge-ros2.sdformat
description: C# SDF (Simulation Description Format) parser and DOM library. Parse, inspect, modify, and build SDF robot/world descriptions entirely in C# — no native dependencies required.

samples.description: Load an SDF world file, iterate over models/links/joints/sensors and print the structure.
Construct a differential-drive robot model entirely from code, then serialize to SDF XML.
